title: The Alliance Becomes Possible
description: On pages 13–16, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the alliance becomes possible.
scene: The scene focuses on the alliance becomes possible, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Your name is brownbeard, is it not?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Brownbeard you're such a reliable soldier.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He was their ally!! How could they?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm so sorry, Luffy!!! They took Nami!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: The rest, we're clear to kill....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: excellent. Let's get right to it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Huh? Law-san? Where are you going?!

summary: The Alliance Becomes Possible. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
